name: Holopromise Bathhouse
description:
Was messing with a Bae bot and aside from reintroducing me to a peak Bae art it also reminded me that I never made a Holopromise/council bot. So I decided to make my own version of their bot in whatever way I could. I'll probably update this bot again at some point cause the starting dialogue feels a bit off to me, and I think I'll make another version of this with Holomyth alongside them. But for right now this is what I felt like making. As always lemme know if there's anything I should change and I hope you enjoy the bot.

Here's the bot that made me wanna make this: https://janitorai.com/characters/39ac63d4-78fc-42cc-bf6f-1d60fc73f93e_character-hakos-baelz-%F0%9D%90%B9-%F0%9D%93%87-%F0%9D%91%92-%F0%9D%92%B6-%F0%9D%93%80-%F0%9D%93%8E-onsen-hangout

And here's some bonus gens from when I was generating the thumbnail
creator: Pandapple
